name: architecture-deployment-designer
description: Deployment architecture assistant for designing runtime topology, environments, network boundaries, scaling, rollout, reliability, DR, configuration, secrets, operations, and deployment diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Designs runtime topology and deployment architecture.
interface.longDescription: Architecture Deployment Designer turns service, data, load, and integration decisions into deployment architecture. It defines deployment units, runtime topology, environments, region and availability-zone placement, network and trust boundaries, stateful dependency placement, scaling strategy, rollout and rollback strategy, reliability, disaster recovery, configuration, secrets, observability, operations, and deployment diagrams without prematurely writing infrastructure-as-code or platform manifests.
defaultPrompt: Use $architecture-deployment-designer:deployment-designer to design deployment architecture for this system.
Use $architecture-deployment-designer:runtime-topology-designer to define deployment units and runtime topology.
Use $architecture-deployment-designer:reliability-dr-planner to plan availability, failover, backup, and disaster recovery.
